basic_details.short_information: Central Warehousing Corporation (CWC) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 18-05-2026 on the official website of Central Warehousing Corporation (CWC). A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CWC Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits and relaxation details.

qualification.education_qualification: Experience in providing Secretarial Services to Senior Level Officers
qualification.details: Experience in providing Secretarial Services to Senior Level Officers which include managing executive schedule, handling correspondences, organizing meetings and maintaining records etc.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Consultant (Secretarial Services), at Corporate Office, New Delhi

salary_details.details: Pay Scale/Tevel: IDA Scale 60000-180000 50% of last drawn Pay (Basic plus Dearness allowance)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CWC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CWC Consultant (Secretarial Services) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the CWC Consultant (Secretarial Services) post is 07 June 2026. Ensure all details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Consultant (Secretarial Services) at the Corporate Office, New Delhi, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CWC Consultant (Secretarial Services) recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official CWC website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Secretarial Services) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Consultant (Secretarial Services) position is based on IDA Scale 60000-180000 (E-3), or 50% of last drawn Pay (Basic plus Dearness allowance).

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have experience in providing Secretarial Services to Senior Level Officers, which includes managing executive schedules, handling correspondence, organizing meetings, and maintaining records.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Consultant (Secretarial Services) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will primarily involve a Personal Interaction with the shortlisted candidates. Further details will be provided by the corporation.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Consultant (Secretarial Services) position at Central Warehousing Corporation is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The Consultant (Secretarial Services) position is located at the Corporate Office, New Delhi.
